name: SKATE PARK
description: Skate park environment — street fashion meets skating culture. Raw, energetic, youth culture.
asset_requirements: Any streetwear product. Bold pieces work especially well in the skate park setting.

input_manifest.label: Product (Front View)
input_manifest.hint: Front of the clothing or product — will be worn in the skate park scene.

input_manifest.label: Product (Back View) — Optional
input_manifest.hint: Optional back view — great for hoodies or jackets with back graphics.

steps.prompt: Skate park street fashion photography. A skater wearing the clothing product at a concrete skate park. Ramps, rails, and graffiti-covered concrete in background. The skater is posed with a skateboard, looking effortlessly cool. Golden hour lighting, wide angle lens, the clothing clearly shown. Raw youth culture energy, authentic skate scene aesthetic.

Skate park fashion video. Skater in the clothing product rides or does a trick at the skate park, camera follows the movement, concrete ramps and graffiti background, dynamic action camera work, the clothing visible and moving naturally. Youth culture energy, authentic skate aesthetic.
